name: dining hall
hints: A dining hall with a table. The table can be taken.
GET TAB to take the table - it's needed to reach the metal bar in the tall room.
S goes to the pyramid entrance. E goes to the hallway with the oyster.
The table is essential - bring it to the tall room (room 11) to reach the metal bar. S=entrance (6), E=hallway (13).
notes: Dining hall with portable table (needed in tall room 11 to reach metal bar). S=entrance (6), E=hallway (13).
